to match the colour of the tile or contrast of tile s, rubbing, washing, curing, cleaning ., . 100mm height, Providing and applying VOC free, Flexible, fast setting seamless spray applied, Pure Polyurea water proof coating consisting of two component rapid curing polyurea system with tensile strength 15MPa and temperature resistance between -20deg.C to +120deg celcius, 1.4mm average thick, which shall be applied over necessary priming coat as per the recommendation of the manufacturer. The application shall be done by using high pressure two component spray proportioning equipment like Graco XP2. Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent. Providing and applying PU BOND COAT @0.15 kg /sqm by brush on application , over this sprinkling sand on top of Polyurea coat on the walls for receiving glass tile application over the plaster surface., 1. Before starting waterproofing works the surface of the wall and floor should be made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease, oily matters . All tie rod holes should be filled properly. All honeycombs should be repaired as per approved repair procedures. Any damp spots on the walls should be attended by grouting with slurry cement mixed with flow enhancers like cebex 100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested. 2. All penetrations should be made water tight. Waterproofing details near the penetrations should be submitted to the client and approval to be obtained prior to start the work. When pipes are fixed in the openings left out while casting structure, the filling of the space between pipe and concrete shall be carried out by approved non shrink cementitous grout. The portion of the pipe having interface with grout shall be roughened by spraying sand over epoxy bonding agent applied on the pipe and old concrete surface in contact with pipe. 3. Pond the pool by keeping water for full depth for atleast 72 hours. Any leakage or dampness on the surface should be arrested by treating the concrete by: injection of PU grout or any other suitable method acceptable to the client / the Engineer. 4. After preparing the tank as mentioned above apply Single component, elastomeric liquid cold applied Poly Urethane membrane for floors (Thickness as per manufacturer specification but shall not be less than 1.5mm thickness) with over 400% elongation and sufficient tensile strength (minimum 4MPa}. The spray applied membrane should be seamless, free of any holes. Applicator should establish the continuity of the membrane with proper overlaps on the wall surfaces to a minimum of 300 mm from FFL with suitable test methods. 5. After completion of waterproofing and allowing curing time, the ponding test shall be carried out to ensure water tightness for a period of 72 hours . 6.Thereafter 250 GSM non woven polypropylene geotextile for horizontal surface. 7.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent., On Floor: Providing & Laying average 50mm THK protective screed of M15 grade to required slope containing 12mm downsize aggregates, with a smooth finish, well compacted, curing for 7 days . . Cracks shall be strictly avoided in screed concrete., On vertical surface : Providing and applying 12 mm thick protective plaster on the wall in cement mortar (1:4), mixing integral waterproofing compound as per manufacturer specifications bonding agent application on the coated surface to receive the plaster.

Description:
1.Treating the Construction Joints : Chase opening the Construction Joints by providing "V" groove,  removing  the  dust  and  clean  the  designated  area following  by  providing  chemical  injection  treatment  in the  form  of  pressure grouting by injecting cement slurry admixed with approved grout admixture,  in the  required  consistency  through  the  pre fixed  PVC nozzles, which shall include drilling of 18 mm dia holes, fixing of PVC nozzles with approved chemical' and final cutting the projected nozzles and sealing off the PVC nozzles after the injection  operation  is  over  with  approved  chemical,  nonshrink  rapid  setting grout, finishing, curing etc. as per manufacturers  specification and as directed.Tierod holes shall be filled with approved grout materials.
 2. Coving: Providing and Applying at the junction of slab and vertical offsets with cement Mortar 1:4 and approved admixture at a size of 75 mm x 75 mm.
3. Bore Packing:  Preparing the inside surface of core and PVC by roughening using suitable file to get better adhesion prior to packing works. Cleaning the surface by wire brushing followed by water jet to remove any laitance or loose flaky  particles.
4. Providing necessary formwork for packing the bore using suitable arrangement (depending  upon  site  conditions).  Applying  a  coat  of  epoxy bonding agent to enhance adhesion between  the packing material and other surfaces. Packing the gap using approved  non-shrink cement polymer based grout. Ponding tests for a period of 48 hours should be conducted before start to ensure water tightness.

Protective layer(Horizontal): Providing & Laying M15 grade screed concrete to required slope admix with integral waterproofing compound Conplast WL  of FOSROC make or Equivalent at the dosage of 125ml/bag of cement over waterproofing layer to a minimum thickness of 50mm or as per site requirement, complete. Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent.

Protective Layer (Vertical): Rendering plastering to internal wall surfaces by 12mm thk in CM 1:4 with waterproofing admixtures as per manufacturer's specifications and clients approval, curing etc. complete.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent.

WATER TANKS OF STP:
Providing and applying Coal tar epoxy coating 2 coats in X&Y direction as per the manufacturer recommendations over the plastered surface in STP raw water tanks to avoid the chemical reaction with water proof coating surface.Coal tar epoxy coating shall be applied to achieve a DFT of 300microns over two coats or as mentioned in the TDS of the material used whichever is higher. Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent.

SUBITEM DESCRIPTION:
Providing waterproofing to the roof by the following method with 10 years guarantee, which consists of : 9.Sand sprinkle to be given for vertical wall surface over the PU waterproof coating to make proper mechanical key for bonding the plaster surface using special bonding agents . Note: Plan area shall be the mode of measurement.

MEASUREMENTS:
Single component pure polyurethane based elastomeric seamless liquid applied membrane: 1.Before starting waterproofing works the surface of the slab should be made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease or oily matters .treating all surface cracks, construction joints and honey combs by grouting with specialised nonshrink grout, injection grouting through nozzles, haunching the corners,bore packing and grouting the annular space between pipe and concrete as specified by approved Contractor and preparation of surface in all aspects to receive the waterproofing Ponding test should be conducted for a period of 72 hours to ensure that there is no leakage from the slab. Any damp spots on the slab should be attended by grouting cement mixed with flow enhancers like Cebex-100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested. 2.After treating the surface as mentioned above apply liquid applied, high performance, pure polyurethane based, single component, low VOC, elastomeric, seamless, moisture curing, waterproof membrane, applied in 2 coats with roller / airless spray,(As required by the manufacturer specifications but minimum thickness (DFT) shall pass 1.5 mm) with over 400% elongation and sufficient puncture resistance and anti-root penetration capacity over one coat of compatible primer at a coverage as per the manufacturer's recommendation . The spray applied membrane should be seamless, free of any holes. Overlap should be as per manufacturer specifications. 3. When spray applied or brush coated procedure is adopted, the coverage of the material should be noted on a daily basis and to be submitted to client. 4.At the expansion joints and termination, the detailing for the membrane application shall be submitted to the Client / the Engineer/QA approval prior to commencing the work. 5.The PU waterproofing membrane should be extended 300mm above FFL on the vertical surface and tucked into the wall by making a groove. 6.Ponding tests for 72 hours should be conducted after the completion of application of membrane to ensure water tightness. 7.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like FOSROC,BASF,SIKA / Equivalent. 8.Thereafter 250 GSM non woven polypropylene geotextile for horizontal surface., For Tiling Area: For Floor: Providing & Laying average 75mm THK protective screed of M15 grade with slope 1:120 or as per approved GFC containing 12 mm downsize aggregates, 100% virgin polypropylene fibers @ 0.9 Kg per Cu.m well compacted, to be broom finish to receive tiling, curing for 7 days, Screed to be laid in panels of 4m wide not more than 200sqm/or as per site condition using alternate panel method and the control joints shall be provided for every 16 sqm, 10mm X 100mm thermocol to be placed at the peripheral corners prior to laying screed and later 10 mm wide X 30 mm deep thermocol to be removed from screed top and to be filled with ShaliTex Bitumen Based Sealing Compound or Equivalent. Construction joint treatment to be ensured in the Screed panels . . NOTE: Only Plan areas shall be considered and necessary shop drawings shall be submitted by contractor for consultants/client approval prior to execution., For vertical surface : 12mm thick protective plaster on the wall in cement mortar (1:4), mixing integral waterproofing compound as per manufacturer specifications bonding agent., For Non Tiling Area (Screed concrete as final finish): For Floor: Providing & Laying average 75mm THK protective screed of M15 grade with slope 1:150 or 1:100 as per approved GFC containing 12 mm downsize aggregates, 100% virgin polypropylene fibers @ 0.9 Kg per Cu.m with a smooth finish, well compacted, curing for 7 days . . 10mm X 100mm thermocol to be placed at the peripheral corners prior to laying screed and later 10 mm wide X 30 mm deep thermocol to be removed from screed top and to be filled with ShaliTex Bitumen Based Sealing Compound or Equivalent. The screed shall be finished with checkered marking of 600 mm x 600mm using 3 mm thread and panels of 3000mm X 3000mm shall be formed by saw cut groove of size 6 mm wide X 30 mm deep (with in 20 hrs time) which then filled with ShaliTex Bitumen Based Sealing Compound by covering either sides neatly with masking tape to avoid spillages, ., clean and . NOTE: Only Plan areas shall be considered and necessary shop drawings shall be submitted by contractor for consultants/Client / the Engineer approval prior to execution., For Vertical surface : 12 mm thick protective plaster on the wall in cement mortar (1:4), mixing integral waterproofing compound as per manufacturer specifications bonding agent.

Sub-Total

Any damp spots on the walls should be attended by grouting with slurry cement mixed with flow enhancers like cebex 100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested. 2. All penetrations should be made water tight. Waterproofing details near the penetrations should be submitted to the client and approval to be obtained prior to start the work. Pond the pool by keeping water for full depth for atleast 72 hours. Any leakage or dampness on the surface should be arrested by treating the concrete by: injection of PU grout or any other suitable method acceptable to the client / the Engineer. 4. After preparing the tank as mentioned above apply Single component, elastomeric liquid cold applied Poly Urethane membrane for floors (Thickness as per manufacturer specification but shall not be less than 1.5mm thickness) with over 400% elongation and sufficient tensile strength (minimum 4MPa}. The spray applied membrane should be seamless, free of any holes. Applicator should establish the continuity of the membrane with proper overlaps on the wall surfaces to a minimum of 300 mm from FFL with suitable test methods. 5. After completion of waterproofing and allowing curing time, the ponding test shall be carried out to ensure water tightness for a period of 72 hours . 6.Thereafter 250 GSM non woven polypropylene geotextile for horizontal surface. 7.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent., On Floor: Providing & Laying average 50mm THK protective screed of M15 grade to required slope containing 12mm downsize aggregates, with a smooth finish, well compacted, curing for 7 days . . Cracks shall be strictly avoided in screed concrete., On vertical surface : Providing and applying 12 mm thick protective plaster on the wall in cement mortar (1:4), mixing integral waterproofing compound as per manufacturer specifications bonding agent application on the coated surface to receive the plaster.

Detailed Description:
All Expansion joint treatment works shall be guaranteed for 10 years from the date of taking over certificate. This Guarantee shall outlive the contract and include that any defect noticed & intimated to the Contractor during the said Guarantee period shall be rectified  free of cost and in case of Contractor failing to do so within a reasonable time, the client / the Engineer shall reserve the right to get the same done at Contractors' risk & cost. Cost shall include reinstating /replacing other finishes in and around the expansion joint works.
The expansion joint systems executed by the contractor should ensure that the products and work executed shall be in compliance with standard norms, UV resistant wherever applicable, temperature variations, thermal stresses induced, anti-root resistance where ever applicable.
The system executed by the contractor shall withstand the building movements arise from thermal expansion and contraction, wind loading, drying shrinkage, creep, settlement, traffic loading, waterproofing  and fire proofing requirements till guarantee period.
Rate is inclusive of all tests to prove the soundness of the products and work executed meeting the codal compliances and above mentioned criteria.
The system shall be designed keeping the relevant code compliances, accessibility and international disability legislation, traffic types, traffic frequency, fire barrier, water tightness, building movements, settlement, construction practices, executed profiles, architectural intent and need, shape and size etc.
Contractor to adopt any other additional items and systems if required to fulfill the requirement of the performance of the system in the rates quoted to be included.
Cost to include cleaning the joint and making it free from moisture, dampness, oil stains, paint and any type of loose aggregates prior to installation of expansion joint system including necessary repair of edges/undulations with polymer modified mortar, micro concrete, self leveling course, curing coating,
Providing and fixing of expansion joints system designed with joint sealing system, Aluminum/S.S extrusions, Anchor bolts, sealants, tapes, capping’s, gaskets, etc., complete as per approved details/drawings. System shall capable of withstanding repeated extensions, compressions, vibrations and cyclic movement without loosing adhesion properties and resist deterioration by weathering, sunlight, ozone, water, salt water, oil, fuels, acids and most of the commonly expossed conditions etc., complete with minimum 50% movement capacity and capable of accommodating multidirectional seismic movement without stress to its components.
The cover plate shall be designed of width and thickness required to satisfy movement and loading requirements and secured to base members by utilizing manufacturer’s pre-engineered self- centering arrangement that freely rotates / moves in all directions.
The joints shall be either with extruded aluminum base members with self aligning and self centering arrangement support plates as per ASTM B221-02 or compression seal system with necessary pads. The system shall be such that it provides watertight barrior not only at expossed surface but also at the structural level and system shal be able to accomodate the required flooring thickness as appropriate. System shall be able to withstand varies traffic loads such as vehicales, trucks, forklifts, cherry pikers, trollys, fire trucks etc and various traffic frequencies as well as intensities.
The Self centering arrangement shall exhibit circular sphere ends that lock and slide inside the corresponding aluminum extrusion cavity to allow freedom of movement and flexure in all directions including vertical displacement.
Provision of Moisture Barrier Membrane in the Joint System to have water tight joint is mandatory requirement.
Cost to include cleaning the joint and making it free from moisture, dampness, oil stains, paint and any type of loose aggregates prior to installation of expansion joint system including necessary repair of edges/undulations with polymer modified mortar, micro concrete, self leveling course, curing coating,
Mode of measurement shall be as per IS:1200
